panels.name: POD#4 Labs — Pre-discharge
panels.preview: WBC 7.4 (normalized). Hgb 12.6, Plt 232. Cr 0.9 (baseline, eGFR 68). K 4.2, Mg 2.1. INR 1.0, aPTT 30. LFTs near normal.

panels.name: POD#1 Labs — Post-op / new AF workup
panels.preview: WBC 11.2 (downtrending from 17.6). Hgb 12.4, Plt 228. Cr 0.9 (back to baseline). K 4.1, Mg 2.0, Ca 8.8 (all normal). Troponin I <0.02 (negative). Glucose 156 on sliding-scale insulin. No thyroid studies on file.

panels.name: ED Admission Labs — Perforated Cholecystitis
panels.preview: WBC 17.6 with neutrophilia (leukocytosis). Hgb 13.0, Plt 244. Cr 1.1 (mild pre-renal bump from baseline 0.9). Total bili 1.6, ALP 142, AST 64, ALT 70 (mild obstructive pattern). Lipase 88 (normal — not pancreatitis). Lactate 2.1. INR 1.1. Glucose 188. CRP 18.

panels.name: Outpatient PCP Labs (most recent baseline)
panels.preview: WBC 6.8, Hgb 13.2, Plt 240. Cr 0.9 (eGFR 68). K 4.2, glucose 142. HbA1c 7.6% (suboptimal control). LDL 72 (at goal). No thyroid panel ordered.
